quality_flags: risk-officer veto_flags present but action is 'sell' instead of 'avoid'

proposals.proposed_rule: Auto-inject 'false_accumulation_trap' into veto_flags; force position_sizing_advice to '0%' and downgrade any bounce thesis to speculative-only.
proposals.rationale: High VR with declining OBV and dispersed chips is a classic distribution-in-disguise pattern. The CRO must explicitly catch this VR/OBV divergence to prevent analysts from misinterpreting volume spikes as institutional buying, especially in mid-cap downtrends.

proposals.pattern: fundamental.valuation_score == 0 OR '估值指标缺失' in red_flags
proposals.proposed_rule: When fundamental valuation is missing/zero, explicitly anchor to F13 (sector weakness) or F8 (distribution regime) to compensate for the missing safety cushion. Do not rely solely on technical breakdown.
proposals.rationale: Missing fundamentals remove the margin of safety. Bear arguments must pivot to structural/sector risks to maintain logical completeness and avoid over-reliance on lagging technical indicators.
